title: Part 7 – Passage unique : offre d'emploi interne
instructions: Lisez l'annonce, puis répondez aux questions.
passage:
Internal Job Posting

Position: Senior Project Coordinator
Department: Operations
Location: Headquarters, 3rd Floor

We are looking for an experienced Project Coordinator to join the Operations team. The successful candidate will be responsible for managing project timelines, coordinating with multiple departments, and preparing weekly progress reports for senior management.

Requirements:
- At least three years of experience in project coordination
- Strong organizational and communication skills
- Proficiency in project management software

This is an internal posting, open only to current employees who have completed at least one year with the company. Interested candidates should submit their updated resume and a short cover letter to the HR department by next Friday. Selected candidates will be contacted for an interview within two weeks of the application deadline.

questions.prompt: What is the purpose of this posting?
choices: To advertise a job to the public
To announce an internal position opening
questions.explanation: Le texte précise : "This is an internal posting, open only to current employees".

questions.prompt: What is one of the responsibilities of the position?
questions.explanation: "preparing weekly progress reports for senior management".

questions.prompt: Who is eligible to apply for this position?
choices: Current employees with at least one year at the company
questions.explanation: "open only to current employees who have completed at least one year with the company".

choices: A resume and a cover letter
A reference letter from their manager
questions.explanation: "submit their updated resume and a short cover letter to the HR department".
